title: AIventure: Vibe Coding Journey
summary: AIventure is an open source retro dungeon crawler built on Angular and Phaser.js, powered by Gemma 4, that teaches developers vibe coding and agentic behaviors. It demonstrates local and cloud model serving options including Transformers.js, Ollama, LM Studio, Gemini API, and Google Cloud.
writeup: This video presents AIventure, an open source retro dungeon crawler built on Angular and Phaser.js and powered by Gemma 4, designed to teach developers vibe coding and agentic behaviors. It walks through model serving options across local and cloud setups: Transformers.js, Ollama, LM Studio, the Gemini API, and Google Cloud. The project covers tool calls, autonomous thinking, prompt engineering, and local inference, using a game as the medium for demonstrating agentic AI in practice.
